blended.narrative: Big White is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 2,222 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
